name: validator
description: Spec directory validation: schema conformance, content paths, DAG checks, orphan detection.

requirements.title: JSON schema conformance
requirements.description: Validate project.json and module.json against their JSON Schemas.

requirements.title: Content path resolution
requirements.description: All content paths resolve to existing markdown files.

requirements.title: DAG acyclicity
requirements.description: Module dependencies and component references form a DAG.

requirements.title: Structured error output
requirements.description: Exit 1 with structured JSON errors listing every violation.

components.name: SchemaChecker
components.description: Validates JSON files against embedded JSON Schemas.

components.name: DAGChecker
components.description: Verifies the spec graph is acyclic.

data_flows.name: Validation pipeline
data_flows.description: JSON files flow through schema check, then structural checks, producing an error report.

test_sections.name: Test coverage for C1 and C2
